reviews.review_title: I just want to do yoga! Not shoot at cra
reviews.review_description: For God's sake, this was billed as a nice yoga routine. What am I saying here?? Balls flying at me that I guess I'm supposed to shoot?? Disabled person here, needs a good exercise routine and chilling, not this s#it. I can't believe I paid money for this

This was my first time doing yoga, so it was a challenge! Having to hit the beats with your face adds an interesting aspect to the game, and having the beats as an objective really pushes me to strive for perfection - they make me want to do the poses the correct way, giving me a strong sense of accomplishment when achieved!

AnOrcaWanders#0550

reviews.review_title: I’m sore all over but ripped all under
reviews.review_description:
This game is honestly challenging, I didn’t expect that… I love the graphics and the physics,  5/5 nice!

My discord tag: 🔥🔥INFERNO🔥🔥 (dynos son)#2190

Edit: I just went back to playing and I had a great time, boosting the stars to 5/5!

I'm not the type to exercise regularly, but this game makes doing it fun. yoga isnt really my thing, but this game makes it easy to learn some basic poses due to the person that helps you at the front of the room.
